name: HydraLiquid – Lifting Solution with Bioretinol
shortDescription: Farmona Professional lifting and skin renewal solution with bioretinol, 500 ml. Collagen stimulation, wrinkle reduction, pigmentation fading. Approx. 50 treatments.
description:
The Farmona Professional Hydra Technology Lifting Solution is a state-of-the-art bioretinol facial tonic that intensively supports skin regeneration, brightening, and tightening.

Bioretinol, niacinamide (vitamin B3), and active hydrating components together stimulate epidermal renewal, promote collagen and elastin production, and refine the appearance of wrinkles and signs of aging.

500 ml size, sufficient for approximately 50 treatments. For professional use only.

faq.question: How many treatments does a 500 ml bottle last?
faq.answer: A 500 ml bottle is sufficient for approximately 50 treatments, which means extremely economical usage.

faq.question: Which devices can this solution be used with?
faq.answer: The solution is a professional liquid designed specifically for cavitation and hydro-abrasion devices. It can also be used in combination with hydrogen cleansing.

faq.question: What skin type is the lifting solution recommended for?
faq.answer: Primarily recommended for mature, wrinkled, and tone-lost skin, and for fading pigmentation spots. Bioretinol supports collagen and elastin synthesis, niacinamide evens out skin tone.

whatsIncluded: 1 pc Farmona Professional HydraLiquid lifting solution with bioretinol (500 ml)
